How it works

Three steps from curious to confident.

No bank account. No real risk. Just a sandbox that behaves like the real market.

01

Get $10,000 in play money

Every account starts with a simulated cash balance. Spend it, lose it, grow it — it resets, your real money never touches it.

02

Trade on real market data

Prices move with the actual market in real time, so what you learn here works the same way out there.

03

Build the habit, not just the score

Bite-size lessons unlock as you trade, turning every win — and every loss — into something you actually understand.

The core feature

Simulated trading that feels real.

This is the whole point of Minty Bath: a live portfolio, real tickers, real volatility — played with money that was never real to begin with.

  • ✓ Buy and sell stocks, ETFs, and crypto with live pricing
  • ✓ Track gains, losses, and diversification like a real brokerage
  • ✓ See exactly why a trade worked — or didn't — with plain-language breakdowns
  • ✓ Compete on class or friend leaderboards, not just against the market
Start a sim portfolio →

🎀

Bite-size lessons

3-minute lessons on diversification, risk, and compounding — unlocked by your own trades.

📊

Portfolio health checks

Plain-language nudges when a portfolio gets too risky, too concentrated, or too cautious.

🏆

Friend & class leagues

Compete on returns with friends or a classroom — bragging rights, not real stakes.

🔒

Built-in guardrails

No real payments, no real brokerage link, no way to ever trade actual money in-app.

Built for trust

For the parent who's actually reading this.

We built the financial literacy course we wish existed when we were 14 — and the safety rails we'd want as a parent.

Zero real money, structurally

There's no payment rail connecting Minty Bath's sim portfolios to real brokerage or bank accounts. It's not a setting — it's not built.

A real curriculum, not just a game

Designed with input from financial educators, mapped to budgeting, investing, and risk literacy standards.

A parent dashboard

See what your kid's learning and how their sim portfolio is doing — without reading every message.

COPPA-minded by design

Built with under-18 privacy norms from day one: minimal data collection, no targeted ads, no chat with strangers.

Questions

Before you download.

No. Every dollar in Minty Bath is simulated. There's no linked bank account, card, or brokerage connection of any kind.

Minty Bath is built for ages 11–17, with content and pacing that adjusts as a learner progresses.

A parent or guardian creates the account and can link a dashboard, but day-to-day use doesn't require parent involvement.

Budgeting apps teach saving. Minty Bath teaches investing — reading markets, managing risk, and building a portfolio — through live simulated trading.

Yes, the core sim trading experience and lessons are free. Optional add-ons may come later, always clearly marked.

Your first portfolio is one tap away.

Free to download. No card required. No real money, ever.
